channel.title: Catholic Book Chat
channel.description: Faithful conversations on classic Catholic books.
channel.itunes:author: Catholic Book Chat Team
channel.itunes:subtitle: Faithful conversations on classic Catholic books.
channel.itunes:summary: Faithful conversations on classic Catholic books.

item.title: Interior Castle — First Mansions
item.description: A brief overview of Carmelite spirituality and Teresa of Ávila, the First Mansions focusing on humility, self-knowledge, and perseverance, with a suggested reading plan and prayer challenge.
item.itunes:title: Interior Castle — First Mansions
item.itunes:subtitle: St. Teresa on beginning the life of prayer
item.itunes:summary: A brief overview of Carmelite spirituality and Teresa of Ávila, the First Mansions focusing on humility, self-knowledge, and perseverance, with a suggested reading plan and prayer challenge.

item.title: Introduction to Confessions
item.description: Why Confessions remains a living companion for modern discipleship, how Augustine frames memory, grace, and restless hearts, and a practical invitation for journaling and examen.
item.itunes:title: Introduction to Confessions
item.itunes:subtitle: Walking with St. Augustine into honest faith
item.itunes:summary: Why Confessions remains a living companion for modern discipleship, how Augustine frames memory, grace, and restless hearts, and a practical invitation for journaling and examen.

item.title: The Great Divorce — Chapter 1
item.description: Opening prayer and intentions for this season of Catholic Book Chat, context for C.S. Lewis and why The Great Divorce still matters for Catholics, and a chapter 1 discussion on freedom, desire, and the first steps of conversion.
item.itunes:title: The Great Divorce — Chapter 1
item.itunes:subtitle: Starting C.S. Lewis with prayer and purpose
item.itunes:summary: Opening prayer and intentions for this season of Catholic Book Chat, context for C.S. Lewis and why The Great Divorce still matters for Catholics, and a chapter 1 discussion on freedom, desire, and the first steps of conversion.
